igbo.use_modus_ponens_p_q_and_p_gives_q: Jiri Modus Ponens: P→Q na P na-enye Q
igbo.use_modus_tollens_p_q_and_q_gives_p: Jiri Modus Tollens: P→Q na ¬Q na-enye ¬P
igbo.hs_chains_p_q_and_q_r_then_mp_with_p: HS na-ejikọ P→Q na Q→R, mgbe ahụ MP na P
igbo.disjunctive_syllogism_p_q_and_p_gives_: Sịlọjizim nke nkewa: P∨Q na ¬P na-enye Q
igbo.conjunction_gives_p_q_then_modus_ponen: Njikọta na-enye P∧Q, mgbe ahụ Modus Ponens na-enye R
igbo.chain_p_q_and_q_r_with_hs_then_again_w: Jikọọ P→Q na Q→R site na HS, mgbe ahụ ọzọ na R→S, mgbe ahụ MP
igbo.mt_on_p_q_gives_p_then_ds_on_p_r_gives: MT na P→Q na-enye ¬P, mgbe ahụ DS na P∨R na-enye R
igbo.hs_gives_p_r_then_mt_with_r_gives_p: HS na-enye P→R, mgbe ahụ MT na ¬R na-enye ¬P
igbo.truth_tables_every_input_combination_e: Tebụl eziokwu — njikọ ntinye ọ bụla, mmepụta ọ bụla
igbo.for_n_variables_the_table_has_2_rows_a: Maka mgbanwe n, tebụl nwere ahịrị 2ⁿ. AND, OR, NOT, XOR, IFF — ọnụ ụzọ ọ bụla bụ naanị otu kọlụm. Algebra Boolean (Boole, 1854) bụ ntọala nke sekit dijitalụ ọ bụla, ajụjụ ọchụchọ ọ bụla, na ọnọdụ ọ bụla na koodu.
igbo.proof_builder_derive_conclusions_step_: Onye na-ewu ihe akaebe — nweta nkwubi nzọ nzọ
igbo.modus_ponens_modus_tollens_hypothetica: Modus ponens, modus tollens, sịlọjizim nke echiche, sịlọjizim nke nkewa — iwu ntụgharị asụsụ asatọ na-ekpuchi ọtụtụ Lọjik nke nkwupụta mmalite. Nzọ ọ bụla na-akwado onwe ya site na AHA, ọ bụghị site na mmetụta.
igbo.challenges_graded_tautology_contradict: Ihe ịma aka — mgbagwoju anya tautology na mmegide nke nwere ọkwa
igbo.tautology_always_true_contradiction_al: Tautology = eziokwu mgbe niile; mmegide = ụgha mgbe niile; ihe nwere ike ime = mgbe ụfọdụ ha abụọ. Iwu Aristotle nke enweghị mmegide (350 TOA) bụ iwu kacha ochie e bipụtara. Omume AP CS Principles + mmalite nke mgbakọ dị iche iche.
igbo.logic_gates_transistors_all_the_way_do: Ọnụ ụzọ Lọjik — transistor ruo n'ala
igbo.nand_is_functionally_complete_you_can_: NAND zuru oke n'ọrụ — ị nwere ike iwu ọnụ ụzọ ọ bụla ọzọ site na NAND naanị. CPU ọgbara ọhụrụ nwere ihe dịka transistor ijeri 10 na-arụ otu mgbakọ Boolean ị na-ewu ebe a.
igbo.probability_logic_inference_under_unce: Lọjik puruiche — ntụgharị n'okpuru ejighị n'aka
igbo.p_and_q_each_carry_a_probability_inste: P na Q nke ọ bụla na-ebu puruiche kama eziokwu/ụgha siri ike. Maka ihe omume nọọrọ onwe ha, P(P∧Q) = P(P) × P(Q). Lee ka oke ntụkwasị obi si agbanwe puruiche dị nro ka ọ bụrụ ntụgharị dị iche iche.
igbo.drag_and_drop_expression_builder: Onye na-ewu okwu site na ịdọrọ-ma-tụba
igbo.drag_tiles_or_click_to_add: Dọrọ taịlị ma ọ bụ pịa iji tinye
igbo.drop_symbols_here_or_click_above: Tụba akara n'ebe a ma ọ bụ pịa n'elu…
igbo.or_type_p_q: Ma ọ bụ pịnye: P → Q
igbo.toggle_english_and_formal_notation: Gbanwee n'etiti edemede Igbo na nke gọọmenti
igbo.enter_an_expression_above_to_generate_: Tinye okwu n'elu iji mepụta tebụl eziokwu
igbo.contingency_sometimes_true: ⚠️ Ihe nwere ike ime (mgbe ụfọdụ eziokwu)
igbo.ai_generate_proof_challenge: AI: mepụta ihe ịma aka akaebe
igbo.ai_generate_proof_challenge_2: 🤖 AI: mepụta ihe ịma aka akaebe
igbo.drag_or_click_to_select: Dọrọ ma ọ bụ pịa iji họrọ
igbo.drag_or_click_to_select_2: Dọrọ ma ọ bụ pịa iji họrọ
igbo.your_interests_basketball_cooking_vide: Mmasị gị (basketball, isi nri, egwuregwu vidiyo...)
igbo.ai_generated_is_this_argument_valid: AI mepụtara: arụmụka a ọ bụ ezi?
igbo.can_we_conclude_the_butler_is_innocent: Anyị nwere ike ikwubi na onye na-eje ozi aka ya dị ọcha?
igbo.can_we_conclude_the_creature_has_no_wi: Anyị nwere ike ikwubi na anụ ahụ enweghị nku?
igbo.can_we_conclude_no_dark_clouds: Anyị nwere ike ikwubi na ọ dịghị igwe ojii gbara ọchịchịrị?
igbo.toggle_inputs_to_see_the_output_live: Gbanwee ntinye iji hụ mmepụta ozugbo
igbo.both_certain_p_q_likely: ✅ Ha abụọ doro anya (P∧Q nwere ike)
igbo.p_likely_q_uncertain: 🟡 P nwere ike; Q ejighị n'aka
igbo.sliders_for_p_q_truth_probabilities_co: Sliders maka puruiche eziokwu nke P, Q na oke ntụkwasị obi. Nsonaazụ ntụgharị dị iche iche nke ọnọdụ 4. Enweghị akara, enweghị ngosipụta.
igbo.independence_vs_correlation_when_does_: Nnwere onwe vs. njikọ — kedu mgbe nke ọ bụla na-arụ ọrụ?
igbo.how_does_threshold_change_inference_ou: Kedu ka oke si agbanwe nsonaazụ ntụgharị?
igbo.i_understand_explain_in_own_words: Aghọtara m — kọwaa n'okwu nke m
igbo.design_note_discrete_4_state_inference: Ndetu imewe: akara ntụgharị dị iche iche nke ọnọdụ 4; enweghị akara puruiche; enweghị ngosipụta — n'ụzọ ezubere.
igbo.toggle_educational_panel_what_is_propo: Gbanwee panel agụmakwụkwọ: Gịnị bụ Lọjik nke nkwupụta?
igbo.learn_what_is_propositional_logic: Mụta: Gịnị bụ Lọjik nke nkwupụta?
igbo.propositional_logic_studies_how_the_tr: Lọjik nke nkwupụta na-amụ otu eziokwu nke nkwupụta mgbagwoju anya si adabere na ndị dị mfe. Otu
igbo.is_any_statement_that_is_either_true_o: bụ nkwupụta ọ bụla nke bụ eziokwu ma ọ bụ ụgha — dị ka «Mmiri na-ezo» ma ọ bụ «2 + 2 = 4».
igbo.valid_vs_invalid_arguments: Arụmụka ezi vs. nke ezughị ezi
igbo.argument_guarantees_the_conclusion_if_: arụmụka na-ekwe nkwa nkwubi MA Ọ BỤRỤ na ntọala bụ eziokwu. Otu
igbo.argument_fallacy_has_a_logical_gap_eve: arụmụka (njehie Lọjik) nwere oghere Lọjik — ọbụlagodi na ntọala bụ eziokwu, nkwubi anaghị eso n'ụzọ doro anya.
igbo.common_fallacies_affirming_the_consequ: Njehie Lọjik ndị a na-ahụkarị: ikwado ihe na-eso (P→Q, Q ∴ P✗), ịgọnarị ihe bu ụzọ (P→Q, ¬P ∴ ¬Q✗)
igbo.truth_tables_boolean_logic_at_a_glance: 🔍 Tebụl eziokwu — Lọjik Boolean n'otu ntì anya
igbo.truth_table_visualization_cycling_thro: Ngosi tebụl eziokwu nke na-agbanwe gabaga site na ọnụ ụzọ Lọjik AND, OR, XOR na NAND.
